examples: Helga: Commander, there were not supposed to be people down here. This changes everything.
Helga: That's right. Then after I'd gone they took the card-reader out and made a fake copy of my card.
Helga: Ten thousand dollars was stolen from my account after I used an automated teller machine (ATM) in the high street last week.
Neither she nor her boss Helga Neumann appear to be too familiar with the new euro money.
"I learned to stay out of his way, " smiles his wife, Helga.
